x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist for SAM is the foundational plugin that enables all AI capabilities for software asset management including license optimization recommendations and reclamation insights. Without it no AI features are available regardless of data quality.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_name: Now Assist for SAM Plugin Status
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var gr = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app"); gr.addQuery("scope", "sn_now_assist_sam"); gr.setLimit(1); gr.query(); if (gr.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Now Assist for SAM is active", finding: "Now Assist for SAM is active. AI-powered software asset recommendations, license optimization suggestions, and reclamation insights are available." }; } var gr2 = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins"); gr2.addQuery("id", "sn_now_assist_sam"); gr2.addQuery("active", true); gr2.setLimit(1); gr2.query(); if (gr2.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Now Assist for SAM is active", finding: "Now Assist for SAM is active. AI-powered software asset recommendations, license optimization suggestions, and reclamation insights are available." }; } return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "Now Assist for SAM not found or inactive", finding: "Now Assist for SAM is not active. All AI-powered SAM capabilities are unavailable without this plugin." }; })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate Now Assist for SAM via the ServiceNow Store. Confirm entitlement with your ServiceNow account team before activation.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_1603e33acfd903108935fb251d851cd1
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[Now Assist for SAM is the foundational plugin that enables all AI capabilities for software asset management including license optimization recommendations and reclamation insights. Without it no AI features are available regardless of data quality.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>Now Assist for SAM Plugin Status</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function() { var gr = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app"); gr.addQuery("scope", "sn_now_assist_sam"); gr.setLimit(1); gr.query(); if (gr.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Now Assist for SAM is active", finding: "Now Assist for SAM is active. AI-powered software asset recommendations, license optimization suggestions, and reclamation insights are available." }; } var gr2 = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins"); gr2.addQuery("id", "sn_now_assist_sam"); gr2.addQuery("active", true); gr2.setLimit(1); gr2.query(); if (gr2.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Now Assist for SAM is active", finding: "Now Assist for SAM is active. AI-powered software asset recommendations, license optimization suggestions, and reclamation insights are available." }; } return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "Now Assist for SAM not found or inactive", finding: "Now Assist for SAM is not active. All AI-powered SAM capabilities are unavailable without this plugin." }; })]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>SAM</module> <number>CHK0006243</number> <order>100</order> <remediation_guidance>Activate Now Assist for SAM via the ServiceNow Store. Confirm entitlement with your ServiceNow account team before activation.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>1603e33acfd903108935fb251d851cd1</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
